storage.name: localStorage persistence
storage.changes: New useStorage hook that persists svgs + colorMap to localStorage. Init from localStorage, fall back to URL hash. Debounced writes. Clear button in header. Max 5 SVGs at 2MB each.

image-upload.name: PNG/JPG/WEBP → SVG extraction
image-upload.changes: Extend SvgUploader to accept image/* files. New useImageLoader hook: render to canvas → getImageData → k-means color extraction (dominant colors). Either (a) convert raster to SVG placeholder or (b) extract color palette from image. File size limit 5MB.

virtual-scroll.name: Virtual scroll for Gallery
virtual-scroll.changes: Replace simple grid with WindowedVirtualScroll (intersection observer based, no extra deps). Render only visible cards + 2 rows buffer. Fixed card height 220px. ~500 galleries without DOM blowup.

unified-export.name: Unified Export dialog
unified-export.changes: New ExportDialog component: tabbed export (SVG, CSS tokens, Palette JSON). Single Cmd+E shortcut. Preview panel shows output before download. Palette export = colorMap as JSON.

mobile.name: Responsive mobile layout
mobile.changes: Breakpoints: stacked single-column ≤1024px. Collapsible sidebar with drawer. Touch-friendly: larger tap targets (min 44px), swipe to close sidebar. Bottom sheet for color picker on mobile. Header collapses to icon-only on ≤640px.

premium-design.name: Premium visual polish
premium-design.changes: Glassmorphism header (stronger backdrop-blur + subtle border). Gradient accents on primary-500 buttons. Page transitions (fade-in on load). Subtle background pattern/grid. Better empty state illustration. Loading skeletons with shimmer animation. Card hover scale(1.01) + lift shadow.

tab-icons.name: Tab icons
tab-icons.changes: Inline SVG icons for Trending (trending-up icon) and Gallery (grid icon) tabs. 16px icons with currentColor fill. No external icon dependency.

card-alignment.name: Card equal-height alignment
card-alignment.changes: Grid cards use flex-col + flex-1 on content to equalize heights. Gallery grid: fixed card height with overflow-hidden. Trending grid: min-h-[180px] cards with consistent spacing.

invariants: No new npm dependencies — only browser APIs
No breaking changes to existing hooks/component APIs
Image files limited to 5MB, SVG files limited to 2MB
